evals.prompt: /cyoda:app I want to build a task management app
evals.expected_output: Gives brief Cyoda orientation, directs to /cyoda:design, then in Step 2 invokes /cyoda:status before asking local vs cloud — if not connected asks local or cloud, guides through setup → build → test → migrate journey

assertions.text: Gives brief Cyoda orientation for newcomer
Directs user to /cyoda:design for domain brainstorm
Invokes /cyoda:status before asking about local vs cloud setup
After design, guides to /cyoda:setup when not already connected
After setup, guides to /cyoda:build
After build, guides to /cyoda:test
Offers /cyoda:migrate when ready for cloud
Does NOT try to design AND build in the same skill invocation

evals.prompt: /cyoda:app — I already know Cyoda, just want to start building
evals.expected_output: Notes experienced users can skip to individual skills, points directly to /cyoda:build, does not force orientation or design

assertions.text: Notes experienced users can skip directly to individual skills
Points directly to /cyoda:build
Does NOT give orientation when user says they already know Cyoda
Does NOT force user through design step when they want to skip

evals.prompt: /cyoda:app — I want to use Cyoda Cloud, not install anything locally
evals.expected_output: Invokes /cyoda:status first; since not connected, accepts cloud-first approach, guides to /cyoda:setup (cloud mode) then /cyoda:auth, does not insist on local installation

assertions.text: Invokes /cyoda:status before asking about setup mode
Presents local cyoda-go and Cyoda Cloud as co-equal options — does not describe local as the primary default or push back on cloud choice
Accepts cloud-first approach without pushback
Guides to /cyoda:setup in cloud mode
Guides to /cyoda:auth for authentication
Does NOT insist on local cyoda-go installation

evals.prompt: /cyoda:app I want to build a chat app
evals.expected_output: In Step 2 invokes /cyoda:status, finds instance already configured, confirms with user whether to use it, and skips setup entirely

assertions.text: Invokes /cyoda:status at the start of Step 2
Confirms with user whether to use the already-configured instance
Does NOT ask local vs cloud or run /cyoda:setup when already connected
